---
name: User Story Template
about: Capture a user story
title: ' (Title)'
labels: ''
assignees:

---

**As a** [role],
**I want** [an action or feature],
**So that** [a reason or benefit].

** Acceptance Criteria **
- [ ] The development team has reviewed and approved the user story.
- [ ] Implementation tickets created and assigned
- [ ] A mapping of this user story to an Application Serviceexists.
- [ ] The functionality was shown to the PO at least once during the development.
- [ ] All implementation tasks are done.

** Definition of Done **
- [ ] Acceptance Criteria met
- [ ] All test cases were successful.
